description:
Did India build Navi Mumbai International in the worst place possible?
🔥 Pre-order Fred's book MEGA BUILDS now 👉 https://bit.ly/3Y63G6X

Full story here - https://theb1m.com/video/the-2bn-airport-built-in-a-swamp

00:00 Intro
01:14 Mumbai's space problem
03:47 Mumbai's big new airport
05:44 A challenging site
08:35 A stunning design
10:40 Access problems

Additional footage and images: Adani, Zaha Hadid Architects, Narendra Modi, Nise leisure, CNN-News 18, Aakash Bhavsar, Ten Studios, Ethan’sphotography 82, Deeptec, Mint, NDTV Profit, Innocentbunny.

For more by The B1M subscribe now 👉 https://bit.ly/the-b1m

We're raising awareness of construction's mental health crisis through our Get Construction Talking initiative. There’s a video series on our channel and you can find support or donate at - https://www.getconstructiontalking.org/
